Target Wording: Apple Inc. commits to reduce absolute scope 1 and 2 GHG emissions 75% by FY2030 from a FY2019 base year. Apple Inc. also commits to reduce absolute scope 3 GHG emissions from purchased goods and services 75% by FY2030 from a FY2019 base year.
The Boeing Company commits to reduce absolute scope 1 and 2 GHG emissions 55% by 2030 from a 2017 base year.
Unilever PLC commits to reduce absolute scope 1 2 and 3 GHG emissions 100% by 2039 from a 2015 base year.
Walmart Inc. commits to set a near-term company-wide emission reduction in line with climate science.
Nestlé S.A. commits to reduce absolute scope 1 2 and 3 GHG emissions 50% by 2030 from a 2018 base year and 100% by 2050.
The Coca-Cola Company commits to reduce absolute scope 1 2 and 3 GHG emissions 25% by 2030 from a 2015 base year.
Microsoft Corporation commits to reduce absolute scope 1 and 2 GHG emissions 75% by 2030 from a 2020 base year.
JBS S.A. committed to reduce GHG emissions. Target removed in 2024 following SBTi review.
PepsiCo Inc. commits to reduce absolute scope 1 and 2 GHG emissions 75% by 2030 from a 2015 base year.
Patagonia Works commits to reduce absolute scope 1 and 2 GHG emissions 90% by 2030 from a 2019 base year.
